stages.concept:
# Unit 115: one of the + 최상급 + 복수명사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **one of the + 최상급 + 복수명사**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> Paris is **one of the most beautiful cities** in the world.
> 파리는 세계에서 가장 아름다운 도시들 중 하나이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **one of the + 최상급 + 복수명사** — 가장 ~한 것들 중 하나

> He is **one of the best** students in the school.
> 그는 학교에서 가장 뛰어난 학생들 중 하나이다.

> This is **one of the most popular** songs this year.
> 이것은 올해 가장 인기 있는 노래들 중 하나이다.

> She is **one of the tallest** girls in her class.
> 그녀는 반에서 가장 키가 큰 소녀들 중 하나이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주의! **복수명사**를 써야 해요! (여러 개 중 하나이니까)

> ❌ one of the best student
> ✅ one of the best **students**

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어로 쓰일 때 동사는 **단수**!

> **One of** the students **is** absent.
> 학생들 중 한 명이 결석이다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 괄호 안에서 알맞은 형태를 고르세요.**
"One of the fastest ( runner / runners ) in the world ( is / are ) from Jamaica."
1. runner, is
2. runners, are
3. runners, is ✅ 

👩‍🏫 선생님: 훌륭해요! '가장 빠른 달리기 선수들(runners) 중 한 명'이라는 뜻이니 명사는 복수를 쓰고, 전체 문장의 진짜 주어는 'One(한 명)'이므로 단수 동사(is)를 써야 합니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: one of the + 최상급 + 복수명사! 복수명사를 쓰되 동사는 단수로! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 115: one of the+최상급+복수명사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
One of the fastest (     ) is the cheetah.
> **정답** animals

---

**02.** One of the ? rivers in Korea is the Han River.
> **정답** longest

---

**03.** One of the most famous ? in Europe is the Eiffel Tower.
> **정답** buildings (landmarks)

---

**04.** One of the ? students in the class is Amy.
> **정답** smartest

---

**05.** One of the most popular ? in the world is soccer.
> **정답** sports

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
One of the tallest building in the city is the tower.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** building → buildings

---

**07.** One of the most famous singer in Korea is BTS.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** singer → singers

---

**08.** One of the fast animals is the lion.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** fast → fastest

---

**09.** One of the most long rivers is the Nile.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** most long → longest

---

**10.** One of the beautiful city in Korea is Gyeongju.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** beautiful city → most beautiful cities

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
세계에서 가장 긴 강 중 하나는 나일강이다.
One of in the world is the Nile.
> **정답** the longest rivers

---

**12.** 한국에서 가장 유명한 도시 중 하나는 부산이다.
One of in Korea is Busan.
> **정답** the most famous cities

---

**13.** 가장 빠른 동물 중 하나는 치타이다.
One of is the cheetah.
> **정답** the fastest animals

---

**14.** 세계에서 가장 높은 산 중 하나는 에베레스트이다.
One of in the world is Everest.
> **정답** the highest mountains

---

**15.** 가장 인기 있는 스포츠 중 하나는 야구이다.
One of is baseball.
> **정답** the most popular sports

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
세계에서 가장 큰 나라 중 하나는 러시아이다.
One of the countries largest in the world is Russia
> **정답** One / of / the / largest / countries / in / the / world / is / Russia

---

**17.** 가장 유명한 과학자 중 하나는 아인슈타인이다.
One the of most famous scientists is Einstein
> **정답** One / of / the / most / famous / scientists / is / Einstein

---

**18.** 반에서 가장 키 큰 학생 중 하나는 민수이다.
One of the tallest students in the class is Minsu
> **정답** One / of / the / tallest / students / in / the / class / is / Minsu

---

**19.** 가장 아름다운 계절 중 하나는 가을이다.
One the of most beautiful seasons is fall
> **정답** One / of / the / most / beautiful / seasons / is / fall

---

**20.** 세계에서 가장 오래된 도시 중 하나는 로마이다.
One of oldest the cities in the world is Rome
> **정답** One / of / the / oldest / cities / in / the / world / is / Rome
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 115: one of the+최상급+복수명사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
This math question is one of the most difficult
________________ I have ever
___________________.
question - seen
questions - see
questions - seen
questions - saw
> **정답** questions - seen

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My dog is one of ____________________ I have ever
__________________.
cutest animals - seen
the cutest animals -seen
the cuter animal - seen
the cutest animals - saw
> **정답** the cutest animals -seen

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom is one of the best _________________ I
_________________________.
friends - meet
friend - have ever met
friend - have meet
friends - have ever met
> **정답** friends - have ever met

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Tom Hanks is the most
______________________ I _____________________.
famous directors - have ever met
famous directors - have ever meet
famous director - meet
famous director - have ever met
> **정답** famous director - have ever met

---

**05.** 다음 중 의미가 나머지와 다른 것은?
The movie is the most exciting movie I have
ever seen.
No other movie is as exciting as that movie.
That movie is not as exciting as other movies.
That movie is more exciting than any other
movie.
> **정답** That movie is not as exciting as other movies.

---

**06.** 다음 글의 빈 칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
We've seen many beautiful buildings in the world, but
the Taj Mahal is one of
____________________________________________
_.
the more beautiful buildings I have ever seen
the most beautiful buildings I have ever seen
the most beautiful building I have ever seen
the most beautiful buildings I saw
> **정답** the most beautiful buildings I have ever seen

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom is the best worker we have ever had.
It is the most surprising plan I have ever heard
of.
An earthquake is one of the most dangerous
natural disaster.
It is one of the biggest mistake he has made.
• natural disaster 자연재해
> **정답** It is the most surprising plan I have ever heard of.,
Tom is the best worker we have ever had.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom is reading one of the most boring novels I
have ever heard of.
That was one of the most funny joke I heard.
This store has one of the cheapest dishes I
have ever found.
Amy is one of the bravest child I have ever
known.
> **정답** Tom is reading one of the most boring novels I have
ever heard of., This store has one of the cheapest
dishes I have ever found.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It was one of the most serious mistakes he
made.
Amy bought one of the most beautiful
clothes she had ever seen.
It is the most comfortable sofa I have ever
owned.
Tom gave Amy one of the biggest diamond
ring she has ever seen.
> **정답** It is the most comfortable sofa I have ever owned.,
Amy bought one of the most beautiful clothes she
had ever seen.

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 내가 이제껏 만난 사람 중 가장 지혜로운 사람 중 한
명이다.
Amy is one of the wisest people I have ever
met.
Amy is one of the most wise people I ever
met.
Amy is one of the wisest person I have ever
met.
Amy is one of the wisest people I have never
met.
> **정답** Amy is one of the wisest people I have ever met.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
뉴욕은 내가 가본 도시들 중 가장 아름다운 도시이다.
New York is the most beautiful city I have ever
visited.
New York is more beautiful than other cities I
have ever visited.
New York is one of the most beautiful cities I
have ever visited.
New York is more beautiful cities I have ever
visited.
> **정답** New York is the most beautiful city I have ever
visited.

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그것은 지금껏 내가 들은 뉴스 중에서 가장 충격적인 뉴스 중
하나였다.
That was one of the most shocking news I ever
hear.
That was one of the most shocking news I
have ever heard.
That was one of the shockingest news I have
ever heard.
That was one of the most shocking news I
hear.
> **정답** That was one of the most shocking news I have ever
heard.

---

**13.** 다음 대화의 빈 칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것은?
A: How do you think you did on the exam this
morning?
B: I think I did pretty well. It was an easy test.
In fact, it was one of ______________________ I have
ever taken.
the tests
the easiest test
the easiest tests
easier test
> **정답** the easiest tests

---

**14.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This is one of the most expensive items in the
shop.
One of my best friends are going to move to
Seoul.
Tom Cruise is one of the best actors in the
world.
She is one of the best players on the team.
> **정답** One of my best friends are going to move to Seoul.

---

**15.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He became one of the tallest kids I have ever
met.
This is one of the funniest movies I have ever
watched.
Tom saw one of the wildest animals he has
ever known.
I am staying in one of the brightest room I
have ever been.
> **정답** I am staying in one of the brightest room I have ever
been.

---

**16.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
This is one of the hardest subjects he's ever
learned.
Amy was listening to one of the loudest
songs she's ever listened to.
Auckland is one of the best places I have ever
been to.
New York is one of the largest city Tom has
ever gone to.
> **정답** New York is one of the largest city Tom has ever gone
to.

---

**17.** 다음 문장 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
He is one of the most popular actors I have
ever seen.
Your teacher is one of the most important
person you have ever met.
Ronaldo is one of the greatest football players
I have ever seen.
He is one of the most brilliant men I have
known.
> **정답** Your teacher is one of the most important person
you have ever met.

---

**18.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
One of the most important
things are your participation.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• participation 참여
> **정답** are → is

---

**19.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
This item is one of the best
seller in my shop.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** seller → sellers

---

**20.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
This movie is one of the
most touching movies I have
never seen.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
• touching 감동적인
> **정답** never → ever
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 115 one of the+최상급+복수명사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 단어를 사용하여 최상급의 의미를 나타내는 문장을
완성하시오.
one, expensive, cars
This is  (     )  in the
world.
정답 one of the most expensive cars

---

**02.** 주어진 단어를 사용하여 최상급의 의미를 나타내는 문장을
완성하시오.
one, impressive, paintings, see
It is  (     )  I have ever
.
정답 one of the most impressive paintings, seen

---

**03.** 주어진 단어를 사용하여 최상급의 의미를 나타내는 문장을
완성하시오.
one, great, inventions
An electric bulb is 
in the world.
정답 one of the greatest inventions

**04.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
모짜르트는 세계에서 가장 위대한 음악가들 중 한 명이었
다.
힌트 (     ) great, musician
Mozart was  (     )  in the
world.
정답 one of the greatest musicians

---

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그는 내가 만났던 가장 재미있는 사람들 중 한 명이다.
힌트 (     ) funny, people
He is  (     )  I have ever
met.
정답 one of the funniest people

---

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Spider-Man은 내가 본 가장 재미있는 영화들 중 하나이
다.
힌트 (     ) interesting, movie
Spider-Man is  (     )  that
I have ever seen.
정답 one of the most interesting movies

---

**07.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
This is one of the most impressive speech I have ever
heard.
→ This is  (     )  I have
ever heard.
정답 one of the most impressive speeches

---

**08.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
One of the most popular tourist attractions are Lotte
Tower.
→ One of the most popular tourist attractions
.
정답 is Lotte Tower

---

**09.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
Amy Kim is best figure skater I have ever seen.
→ Amy Kim  (     )  I have
ever seen.
정답 is the best figure skater

---

**10.** 어법상 틀린 곳을 바르게 고쳐 문장을 완성하시오.
It was more touching novels I have ever read.
→ It  (     )  I have ever
read.
정답 was the most touching novel

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 115: one of the+최상급+복수명사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
This science question is one of the most difficult ________________ I have ever ___________________.
question - seen questions - see questions - seen questions - saw
> 정답: questions - seen

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My cat is one of ____________________ I have ever __________________.
cutest animals - seen the cutest animals -seen the cuter animal - seen the cutest animals - saw
> 정답: the cutest animals -seen

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom is one of the best _________________ I _________________________.
friends - meet friend - have ever met friend - have meet friends - have ever met
> 정답: friends - have ever met

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom Hanks is the most ______________________ I _____________________.
famous actors - have ever met famous actors - have ever meet famous actor - meet famous actor - have ever met
> 정답: famous actor - have ever met

---

**05.** 다음 중 의미가 나머지와 다른 것은? Titanic is the most touching movie I have ever seen. No other movie is as touching as Titanic. Titanic is not as touching as other movies. Titanic is more touching than any other movie.
> 정답: Titanic is not as touching as other movies.

---

**06.** 다음 글의 빈 칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
We've seen many beautiful parks in the world, but Central Park is one of ____________________________________________ _.
the more beautiful parks I have ever seen the most beautiful parks I have ever seen the most beautiful park I have ever seen the most beautiful parks I saw
> 정답: the most beautiful parks I have ever seen

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom is the best artist we have ever had.
It is the most amazing plan I have ever heard of.
A tornado is one of the most dangerous natural disaster.
It is one of the biggest mistake she has made.
> 정답: It is the most amazing plan I have ever heard of.,

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Amy is reading one of the most boring books I have ever heard of.
That was one of the most funny joke I heard.
This shop has one of the cheapest meals I have ever found.
Tom is one of the bravest child I have ever known.
> 정답: Amy is reading one of the most boring books I have

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 옳은 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
It was one of the most serious errors he made.
Amy bought one of the most beautiful outfits she had ever seen.
It is the most comfortable chair I have ever owned.
Tom gave Amy one of the biggest diamond ring she has ever seen.
> 정답: It is the most comfortable chair I have ever owned.,

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 내가 이제껏 만난 사람 중 가장 지혜로운 사람 중 한 명이다.
Tom is one of the wisest people I have ever met.
Tom is one of the most wise people I ever met.
Tom is one of the wisest person I have ever met.
Tom is one of the wisest people I have never met.
> 정답: Tom is one of the wisest people I have ever met.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
파리는 내가 가본 도시들 중 가장 아름다운 도시이다.
Paris is the most beautiful city I have ever visited.
Paris is more beautiful than other cities I have ever visited.
Paris is one of the most beautiful cities I have ever visited.
Paris is more beautiful cities I have ever visited.
> 정답: Paris is the most beautiful city I have ever

---

**12.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그것은 지금껏 내가 들은 소식 중에서 가장 놀라운 소식 중 하나였다.
That was one of the most surprising news I ever hear.
That was one of the most surprising news I have ever heard.
That was one of the surprisingest news I have ever heard.
That was one of the most surprising news I hear.
